tasks.label: Build Running CMake in Docker
args: . /workspace/Utilities/Scripts/build-cube/setup-environment.sh && apt-get install -y cmake && cd /workspace/Examples/Apps/Running/Software/Apps/Running-CMake && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make

tasks.label: CMake: Running Build
args: cd ${workspaceFolder}/Examples/Apps/Running/Software/Apps/Running-CMake && mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake .. && make
cd /d ${workspaceFolder}\Examples\Apps\Running\Software\Apps\Running-CMake && if not exist build mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && cmake --build .
cd /d ${workspaceFolder}\Examples\Apps\Running\Software\Apps\Running-CMake && if exist build rd /s /q build
